summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bare Force One iteration 4 changes. All key features tested successfully including new /request-proposal page, stats updates, testimonial rebranding, tel: links implementation, and SEO files.
passed_tests: Backend /api/contact form submission and validation working correctly
Backend /api/request-proposal endpoint working with proper validation
Backend validation correctly rejects empty name, invalid email, empty organization, empty description
Home page hero CTAs route correctly to /capabilities and /request-proposal
Stats section displays 50+ Projects Delivered (updated from 25+)
Testimonials properly rebranded to use 'BFO team' and 'Bare Force One' (no John/John-Paul)
Phone numbers are clickable tel: links in Footer, Contact page, About page, and proposal success message
New /request-proposal page loads with complete structured form
Request proposal form submission works end-to-end with backend integration
All form fields present: contact info, project details, technical requirements
Enterprise page loads with clean background (no artifacts)
sitemap.xml accessible at /sitemap.xml with valid XML structure
robots.txt accessible at /robots.txt with proper directives and sitemap reference
Original contact form functionality preserved and working
CTA section correctly says 'Request Proposal' instead of 'Contact Us'
All 8 original pages + new /request-proposal page functional
